monster_intents: test whether strangers are worthy prey
monster_signs: scratches appear too high on nearby trees
small animals have been arranged in circles
the ground is warm despite the weather
discarded gear has been carefully cleaned
a low chant seems to come from underground
monster_weaknesses: bright cloth used as a distraction
noncombat_options: offer food and withdraw without sudden movement
invoke an old local custom of hospitality
trade a secret more valuable than coin
help it against a mutual enemy
return something taken from its territory
avoidance_options: leave the marked trail before dusk
cover reflective equipment and travel silently
use animal tracks to circle its territory
create a noisy decoy far from the route
safe_combat_options: fight from a narrow choke point
separate it from its allies with fire
attack only after learning its retreat route
